title: Make AstNode::addHereThisAsNext always O(1)
body:
Self explanatory patch, but error prone code so please review. In particular the iterator fixup looks a bit messy but is required for correctness (and I believe this is the equivalent of the original).

Note without this the recently added code motion in V3MergeCond (#3125) is actually O(n^2), though the default `--output-split-cfuncs` saves us from blowing up in the common case. With this it's back to O(n).
